hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then python -m ruff check --fix --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; python -m ruff format --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" | grep -qE '(git commit|git push)'; then cd "$CLAUDE_WORKING_DIRECTORY" && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q --timeout=30 2>&1 | tail -5 && python -m ruff check vetinari/ tests/ 2>&1 | tail -10 && python scripts/check_vetinari_rules.py --errors-only 2>&1 | tail -10; fi

cd "$CLAUDE_WORKING_DIRECTORY" && echo '=== Ruff Lint ===' && python -m ruff check vetinari/ tests/ 2>&1 | tail -20 && echo '=== Ruff Format ===' && python -m ruff format --check vetinari/ tests/ 2>&1 | tail -10 && echo '=== Vetinari Rules ===' && python scripts/check_vetinari_rules.py 2>&1 | tail -30 && echo '=== Quick Test ===' && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q --timeout=30 2>&1 | tail -10
